nasb.text: You shall fear the Lord your God; you shall serve Him and cling to Him, and you shall swear by His name.

esv.text: You shall fear the Lord your God. You shall serve him and hold fast to him, and by his name you shall swear.

cnv.text: 你要敬畏耶和華你的　神，事奉他，依靠他，奉他的名起誓。

ccb.text: 你们要敬畏你们的上帝耶和华，事奉祂，倚靠祂，凭祂的名起誓。
